---
title: "Ren SATO"
lang: en
---


## About

Doctoral Program, Department of Bioengineering, Graduate School of Engineering, The University of Tokyo (from FY2026)
Katashima-Chung Lab.

## Keyword

Rheology
Psycho-rheology
Cognition science
Polymer physics
Gel
Transient network


## Research

The relationship between tactile cognition and rheological property.

## Links
- Google Scholar
https://scholar.google.co.jp/citations?user=0wo5w1IAAAAJ&hl=ja&oi=ao
